message:
Running command: # Runner uses 180s compile timeout and 60s simulation timeout
# Each scenario takes ~1s compile + 5-15s sim = ~15s, 21 scenarios = ~315s
# The outer bash timeout was 600s which should be enough

# Let me run the verification with a longer outer timeout and redirect output to file
cd /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526
nohup python3 mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/verification/nc_verify_runner.py \
  --design-root mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu \
  --all --coverage \
  --nc-lib-root /nc/apps \
  --rv-prefix riscv32-unknown-elf \
  --jobs 0 \
  > /tmp/verify_full.log 2>&1 &
echo "PID: $!"
